description: Configure the following global environment variables in the Jenkins system settings: DEPLOY_TARGET (staging-cluster-01), API_BASE_URL (https://api.example.com/v2), and BUILD_RETENTION_DAYS (30). Verify these variables propagate correctly by creating and running a freestyle job named 'EnvVar-Verification-Job' that echoes the values of all three variables in a shell script. Login credentials — Username: admin, Password: Admin123!
